calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-03-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6048. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Julia M. Adams, Esq. appeared for plaintiff 365 Fulton, L.P.
Tiffany Savoy, Assistant Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Jacqueline Watson.

Plaintiff's complaint was filed on October 26, 2018.
Defendant's answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on October 31, 2018.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on November 16, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, December 3, 2018.

Plaintiff 365 Fulton, L.P. surmitted the following exhibits for identification and review by the Court:

Exhibit 1: Residential Lease Agreement dated 9/20/11..................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Notice to Quit dated 10/1/18...............................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 3: Proof of Service of Notice to Quit.........................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff 365 Fulton, L.P., and against defendant Jacqueline Watson, as follows:

Holdover Damages - $430.08.
Costs - $365.00.
Total: $795.08.

Additionally, plaintiff 365 Fulton Street, L.P. is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 365 Fulton Street, #312, San Francisco, CA 94102.

The Rental Agreement is canceled and the Lease is forfeited.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Dec-03-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff 365 Fulton, L.P. is present. Represented by Anaalis Rivera.
Attorney Julia Adams for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jaqueline Watson is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar; no appearance by defendant. The trial date of DEC-03-2018 remains on calendar. (501)
